Pricing

Simple pricing for growing teams

Start free, upgrade when you need more control, analytics, and insight.

Free

For getting started

$0
  • Basic short links
  • Limited analytics
  • 1 workspace
  • QR code support
Most Popular

Pro

For marketers and creators

$19/mo
  • Branded links
  • Advanced analytics
  • Custom slugs
  • Smart routing
  • AI insights
  • Priority support

Business

For growing teams

$49/mo
  • Everything in Pro
  • Custom domains
  • Team management
  • Conversion tracking
  • API access
  • Dedicated support
All plans include SSL, link redirects, and basic analytics. No contracts. Cancel anytime.
